examples: He felt cut off from his family.
The village was cut off by the flood.
The road was cut off by snow.
The water supply was cut off.
They were cut off from the outside world.
The phone was cut off during the call.
The storm cut off all communication.
Don't cut me off while I'm speaking!
He cut off a piece of bread.
example_translate: Он чувствовал себя отрезанным от семьи.
Они были отрезаны от внешнего мира.
Не перебивай меня, пока я говорю!
cut off.synonyms:
Отрезать, отсекать - sever, disconnect, remove
Изолировать, отрезать (от чего-либо) - isolate, separate
